rulings.Case Title: SAN JOSE MERCURY NEWS VS. CALIFORNIA PUBLIC EMPLOYEES RETIREMENT SYSTEM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition And Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE BY CALPERS DENIED. VENUE PROPER UNDER CCP 401(1). CCP 401(2) OR CCP CCP 393 NOT APPLICABLE. AGREEMENT BETWEEN CALPERS AND CALIFORNIA ENERGY VENTURES CONTAINING VENUE PROVISIONS NOT APPLICABLE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF MERCURY NEWS NOT PARTY. HEARING REQUIRED RE PETITION FOR DISCLOSURE. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE AT HEARING EXACT STATEMENT OF WHAT ENCOMPASSED WITH DETAILED STATEMENT OF FUND PERFORMANCE. CALPERS TO STATE PRECISELY WHY INFORMATION REQUESTED IS A TRADE SECRET. (302/AJR/RS)
